creator: dam@my.gd
text:
Thanks Vladimir, will review and get back to you ASAP.


With regards to issue 151, I am afraid I am yet to receive confirmation from upstream as to whether the shell escape is still exploitable.

I was unable to reproduce the issue using the instructions in the original thread with 0.9.18 release from February :
- regular escape : echo () sh && echo
- control characters: echo<ctrl+v><ctrl+i>()sh && echo


Will check on the others.
